title: Flu Vaccine Safety and Pregnancy | Influenza (Flu) | CDC
text:
children with major birth defects. 
A VSD study 6 examined stillbirth rates in pregnant women aged 14-49 years between 2007 and 2015 and did not find a significant association between influenza vaccination during pregnancy and stillbirth.
